title: Axalta Stock Is Down 10% in a Year, but One Investor Just Bought $9.5 Million in Shares
author: Jonathan Ponciano
description: Leeward Investments purchased 323,314 shares of Axalta Coating Systems for approximately $9.48 million in February 2026, despite the stock being down nearly 10% over the past year. The investment appears contrarian, as Axalta has delivered strong operational results including record adjusted EBITDA of $294 million and 22.8% margins, suggesting the stock's underperformance may mask improving fundamentals.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Despite stock being down 10% year-over-year, the company shows strong operational metrics with record adjusted EBITDA of $294 million, margin expansion to 22.8%, and robust capital allocation including $100 million in share repurchases. Insider buying by Leeward Investments suggests confidence in undervalued fundamentals.
Mentioned as a top holding of Leeward Investments alongside Axalta, characterized as a cyclical business where cyclical pressure masks improving economics. No specific performance data provided.

title: Incinerator Market Size to Hit USD 22.70 Billion by 2035 | Research by SNS Insider
author: Sns Insider
description: The global incinerator market is expected to grow from USD 16.23 billion in 2025 to USD 22.70 billion by 2035 at a CAGR of 3.46%, driven by rising municipal waste volumes, stricter environmental regulations, and increased adoption of energy recovery technologies. The U.S. market specifically is projected to expand from USD 3.40 billion to USD 4.60 billion over the same period. Key growth segments include biomedical waste treatment and heat recovery systems, with Asia Pacific leading regional market share at 39%.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Listed as a leading market player in the growing incinerator market with projected 3.46% CAGR through 2035, benefiting from increased demand for waste management solutions and energy recovery technologies.

title: Healthcare Waste Treatment Market to Reach $31.4 Billion, Globally, by 2035 at 5.5% CAGR: Allied Market Research
author: Allied Market Research
description: The healthcare waste treatment market is expected to grow from $16.6 billion in 2023 to $31.4 billion by 2035, driven by the rising volume of medical waste, stringent government regulations, and technological advancements. The incineration and non-hazardous waste segments are expected to maintain their leadership positions, while the chemical treatment and hazardous waste segments are projected to see the highest growth.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article mentions Clean Harbors, Inc. as one of the leading players in the healthcare waste treatment market, but does not provide any additional information about the company's performance or outlook.

title: Recycled Plastic Market to Propel Growth at USD 81.10 Billion by 2031 |SkyQuest Technology
author: Skyquest Technology
description: The global recycled plastic market is projected to reach USD 81.10 billion by 2031, growing at a CAGR of 6.1% during the forecast period. The growth is driven by increasing demand for recycled plastics in various industries, such as construction, automotive, and electronics.
